title: Travel App — 6s TikTok Hook (Sora)
description: Sora prompt that produces a cinematic 6-second travel hook: aerial pull-out, location-switch hard cut, and on-screen text drop-in. Plug in your destination + app feature.

title: Travel App — UGC POV Voiceover
description: ElevenLabs voiceover script + HeyGen avatar prompt for a 'POV: I just discovered this app' style ad. Tested on TravelAnimator funnel.

title: Mobile App — Before/After Static
description: Image-ad prompt that generates a pixel-clean before/after split for any mobile app feature. Works for productivity, AI, and creative tools.

title: Mobile App — App Store Screenshot Set
description: Generates 5-screen ASO bundle (hero + 4 feature shots) with consistent typography and on-device frames. Drop your app name + 5 features.

title: Casual Game — 3-Hook Variant Pack
description: Claude prompt that spits out 3 distinct hook angles (loss-aversion, identity, pattern-break) for any casual mobile game. Use for PuzzleCafe-style funnels.

title: Casual Game — Gameplay Reaction UGC
description: Reaction-style UGC script template — '3 levels in and i'm hooked' format. Pair with a phone-cam frame and HeyGen avatar.

title: SaaS — Problem→Solution 15s Reel
description: Reel script template structured around pain → product → proof → CTA. Ideal for founder-led SaaS ads on LinkedIn + Meta.

title: SaaS — Comparison Carousel
description: Carousel ad prompt that auto-fills a 'before tool / with tool' comparison across 6 slides. Great for productivity SaaS.

title: E-commerce — Product Hero (Static)
description: Image prompt for a product hero shot on a colored gradient stage with prop debris. Works for D2C beauty, gadgets, food.

title: E-commerce — UGC Unboxing Hook
description: Unboxing-format script + shot list optimised for first-3-second retention. Includes hands-only B-roll cues.

title: Fitness — 30-Day Transformation Reel
description: Voiceover + b-roll prompt for 30-day fitness transformations without a real face on camera. Pure AI UGC.

title: Fitness — Static Ad: '5-min Routine'
description: Image ad with a 5-step icon stack and a strong CTA. Works for habit, fitness, mindfulness apps.

title: Beauty — Skincare 'Glow-up' UGC
description: Day-1 vs Day-30 voiceover script + lighting/lens cues. Keeps it organic-feeling for Meta beauty funnels.

title: Beauty — Ingredient Spotlight Carousel
description: Carousel template that breaks down a single hero ingredient across 5 slides with chemistry-paper aesthetics.

title: Food — 6s Sizzle Cut
description: Sora prompt that generates a fast-cut food sizzle reel — close-ups, sauce drips, steam. Drop in your dish + brand.

title: Food — Delivery App Promo Static
description: Image ad prompt for delivery-app promos with discount badge, hero dish, app icon, and CTA stack.

title: Education — Course Promo Reel
description: Reel script that frames a course around outcome-first promises. Pairs with HeyGen 'lesson preview' avatar.

title: Education — '5 Things You Don't Know' Hook
description: Listicle reel hook structure for any teaching niche. Designed for high retention on TikTok.

title: n8n — Creative Inspo Scraper
description: Full n8n workflow JSON: scrapes ads + organic from a list of competitors, drops a Slack digest with thumbnails.

title: n8n — Brief → Ad Pipeline
description: Workflow that converts a brief in a Notion page into a HeyGen + ElevenLabs render and pings Slack when done.

title: Universal — 10 Ad Hook Generator
description: Claude prompt that generates 10 distinct ad hook angles for any product. The first thing I run on every new account.

title: Universal — Pattern-Interrupt Hook Pack
description: Claude prompt that produces 8 pattern-interrupt openers (visual + verbal) for short-form video.
